generatedBy: Task-7.1 — NFT bench baseline capture (all 19 NFTs measured, Replit container 2026-05-09)
notes: Task-7.1 (2026-05-09): First full baseline capture for all 19 NFT bench proxies. All measurements from .run-output/ promoted. NFT-19 (Playwright E2E) runs in apps/editor-bench/ — not a Node bench. hardFail entries are CI merge blockers; all others are warn-only (flip schedule in per-sprint exit criteria). CI gate: .github/workflows/ci.yml 'bench' job runs pnpm bench → check-regression.mjs. S01 baseline preserved and all p50/p95/p99 values refreshed with 2026-05-09 measurements.

command-bus.execute.move-cube.notes: move-cube command-bus dispatch. Replit 2026-05-09: p95=11.35ms. Budget=1ms reflects original S01 microbench target; real dispatch includes store validation overhead.

frame-scheduler.idle-cpu.notes: S03-T4 gate. Per-probe-frame ms inside FakeRafAdapter.pump() AFTER the scheduler has self-stopped. warnMs=2%×16.67ms; budgetMs=2.5%×16.67ms (CI hard-fail per S03 exit criteria line 410). Replit 2026-05-09: p95=0.0007ms — 595× under budget.

schemas.roundtrip.wall.notes: Wall schema Zod roundtrip (parse+serialize). Replit 2026-05-09: p50=0.018ms p95=0.042ms.

landing-first-paint.notes: NFT-2 headless proxy (01-VISION §5 row 2). composeRuntime no-canvas — JS-bundle-mount stage of landing flow. Real LCP <600ms target measured in-browser (apps/editor-bench/). Replit 2026-05-09: p50=17ms p95=26ms over 20 samples.

ui.auth-modal-open.notes: Flow-1 step 1.2. AuthModal construction cold (injectAppTheme+buildOverlay+attachListeners+AuthClient). Replit 2026-05-09: p50=2.73ms p95=15.4ms — 3.2× under 50ms ceiling.

persistence.codec-spike.encode.json.notes: S03-T8. Encode 1K wall.create events (JSON). Replit 2026-05-09: p95=12ms.

persistence.codec-spike.encode.msgpack.notes: S03-T8. Encode 1K wall.create events (MessagePack v3). Replit 2026-05-09: p95=18.5ms.

persistence.codec-spike.decode.json.notes: S03-T8. Decode 1K wall.create events (JSON). Replit 2026-05-09: p95=8ms.

persistence.codec-spike.decode.msgpack.notes: S03-T8. Decode 1K wall.create events (MessagePack v3). Replit 2026-05-09: p95=8.1ms.

persistence.save-edit.append.memory.notes: S04-T4. Single-event append against InMemoryBackend. Target <10ms. Replit 2026-05-09: p95=0.015ms — 800× under budget.

persistence.save-edit.append.idb.notes: S04-T4. Single-event append against IndexedDbBackend (fake-indexeddb). Target <10ms. Replit 2026-05-09: p95=0.78ms — 15× under budget.

file-format.pack.medium.notes: S20 exit gate. Pack medium .pryzm fixture (4 levels × 3 chunks = 12 chunks, 500 events). Hard-fail >5s p95. Replit 2026-05-09: p95=47.6ms — 105× under budget.

file-format.unpack.medium.notes: S20 exit gate. Unpack medium .pryzm fixture. Hard-fail >3s p95. Replit 2026-05-09: p95=16ms — 188× under budget.

bake.incremental.single-wall-edit.notes: S21 exit gate #1. Single wall-edit → bake session → ChunkWriter → InMemoryStorageDriver. Hard-fail >1.5s p95. Replit 2026-05-09: p95=8.9ms — 168× under budget.

sync.roundtrip.append-to-push.notes: S22 exit gate #4. Two ws clients on createSyncServer({}); client A append → client B push. In-memory event log, no Postgres. Hard-fail >250ms p95. Replit 2026-05-09: p50=1.6ms p95=5.55ms — 45× under budget.

dimension-schema.notes: S31/Phase-2B. DimensionStringSchema.parse over 1000 fixtures (6 kinds). Hard-fail >50ms p95. Replit 2026-05-09: p95=10.7ms — 4.7× under budget.

largest-model.parse.notes: S71 perf gate. 10K-wall × 50-level fixture Zod parse. Catastrophic-regression detector (30× headroom). Replit 2026-05-09: p95=33.2ms — 36× under 1.2s budget.

largest-model.produce.notes: S71 perf gate. 10K-wall × 50-level fixture geometry-kernel produce. Catastrophic-regression detector (48× headroom). Replit 2026-05-09: p95=185.8ms — 48× under 9s budget.

cold-boot.notes: NFT-1 headless proxy (01-VISION §5 row 1). cold composeRuntime({canvas:null}) — Stage-1 JS-only cost. Real wall-clock target <2.5s on M1/Chrome/throttled-4G measured in-browser (apps/editor-bench/). Replit 2026-05-09: p50=16ms p95=18ms over 20 samples — 137× under 2.5s proxy budget.

crdt-merge.notes: NFT-7 real Yjs 2-client Y.Doc merge (Wave A19-T10+T15). p95 < 80ms exit gate. ops/s ≥50 also enforced. Convergence verified with key-sorted comparison (Yjs insertion-order independent). Replit 2026-05-09: p50=0.11ms p95=0.53ms over 500 merge ops — 150× under 80ms budget.

sync-conflict.notes: NFT-8 proxy (01-VISION §5 row 8). Headless conflict detection — Yjs Y.Doc merge + convergence check for concurrent edits. Real target <1s including network RTT. Replit 2026-05-09: p50=0.16ms p95=0.86ms over 200 ops.

ifc-import-tier1.notes: NFT-9 headless proxy (01-VISION §5 row 9). extractAllPsets(500 elements) + Wall.parse×500 — CPU-bound share of tier-1 IFC import (no WASM geometry, no file I/O). Real target <8s for 500 elements (WASM+parse+bake+mesh). Replit 2026-05-09: p50=1347ms p95=1840ms — 4.3× under 8s proxy budget.

ai-critique.notes: NFT-14 headless proxy (01-VISION §5 row 14). computeCostUSD + CostMeter budget check — pure JS overhead before/after AI call (no network). Real target <3s p95 = LLM time-to-first-token (in-browser). Replit 2026-05-09: p50=0.0006ms p95=0.002ms over 5000 ops.

bundle-size.notes: NFT-15 proxy (01-VISION §5 row 15). Non-timing measurement: gzip(@pryzm/schemas export manifest) bytes. See .run-output/bundle-size.json for gzipKB. Real NFT-15 target <250KB gzip — measured by vite build --analyze (post-Wave-13 browser harness). No budgetMs applies to this bench.

memory-ceiling.notes: NFT-16 proxy (01-VISION §5 row 16). Non-timing: RSS delta for 2k WallStore elements (linear extrapolation to 10k). See .run-output/memory-ceiling.json for rssDeltaMiB. Real NFT-16 target <500MB RSS total (incl. GPU) measured in-browser. No budgetMs applies.

plugin-sandbox-overhead.notes: NFT-17 headless proxy (01-VISION §5 row 17). buildPluginCSP + buildIframeHeadHTML + PluginManifestSchema.parse — setup cost per plugin activation. Per-message JSON.stringify overhead included. Real target <5ms/message (browser postMessage RTT excluded). Replit 2026-05-09: p50=0.005ms p95=0.012ms over 5000 ops — 416× under 5ms budget.

frame-budget.notes: NFT-4 headless proxy (01-VISION §5 row 4). FrameScheduler drain overhead with FakeRafAdapter — scheduling cost only, no GPU. Real 16.6ms frame budget includes GPU render pass (in-browser harness). Replit 2026-05-09: p50=0.005ms p95=0.0075ms over 200 frames — 133× under 1ms proxy budget.

bcf-roundtrip.notes: NFT-10 proxy (01-VISION §5 row 10). BCF issue round-trip (encode+decode). Replit 2026-05-09: p50=9.64ms p95=27.55ms over 15 samples.

sheet-view-redraw.notes: NFT-12 proxy (01-VISION §5 row 12). Sheet-view redraw scheduling overhead. Real target ≤16.6ms per frame. Replit 2026-05-09: p50=0.036ms p95=0.125ms.
